mechanics.excerpt: Despite the government's neavy hand some Capellan artists manage produce alternative work_ at their own expense and often at Great risk: Such works are huge demand outside the Confederation: Nohkabu theater; one of the Draconis Combine finest art forms_ unfortunately deemed the private possession of that realm. On rare occasions gifted troupe allowed perform for outsiders; permission t0 do 50 considered among the highest compliments_ official holovids of these perform- ances have been released, though bootleg copies exist.
